creator: curt@h2.kcwc.com
text:
The shmget(2) man page lists SHM_R and SHM_W as defines but the
	include file (sys/ipc.h) has them as IPC_R and IPC_W.  Either
	the man page should be changed or the SHM_R and SHM_W defines
	need to be added.  I don't know the history of SV shared
	memory system so I don't known which change would be better.

Fix: 

Yes, please
How-To-Repeat: 
	man shmget
